purpose: Stable object naming and custom-property registry for later Blender/Twinmotion/Unreal/WebGL handoff. This is metadata only and does not create or approve final geometry.

rules: This registry is an identity and custom-property contract, not geometry.
A later Blender export must use stable_object_name as the object name or a preserved custom property.
Opening component objects remain metadata-only until exact CAD subparts are bound and user-review gates pass.
Ground-floor wall objects remain QA-preview only until openings, heights and roof joins are final-bound.
The V01 house shell remains a positional placeholder and must not be exported as the final house.
